candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line at top of income statement; preferred over duplicated total line.
Also a revenue line, but appears to duplicate Sales exactly; useful as fallback across years.

variables.notes: Use as priority list, not sum. Sales is preferred because it is the primary top-line label; Total Revenue is a duplicate/fallback.

candidates.why: Direct COGS line immediately below revenue; best semantic match.
Alternative COGS label present for some years; useful fallback.

variables.notes: CR:c|high|double. Priority list across years. Avoided balancing-value row.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A component representing selling overhead.
Clear SG&A component representing administrative overhead.
Dedicated R&D line above operating income; included in XSGA as well so XSGA-XRD removes it per rule.
Explicit SG&A row exists but appears unpopulated in preview; component rows are preferred over subtotal-style aggregate.

variables.notes: No populated explicit SG&A line is available; selected granular overhead components. Included R&D as well because it is separately reported above operating income, so XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD yields SG&A excluding R&D.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above operating income.

variables.notes: Same row is also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS so downstream subtraction removes it appropriately.

candidates.why: Primary recurring interest expense line; prefer granular interest rows over total financial expenses/net finance cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses on pension provisions, net

candidates.why: Recurring interest component present in earlier years.
May capture recurring finance costs not otherwise broken out; included only because no total/net finance line is selected and rule allows recurring finance costs.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses on pension provisions, net

variables.notes: Selected recurring finance cost components and excluded Financial expenses/Finance net totals to avoid double counting, as well as excluded FX forwards, exchange differences, and fair value rows as non-interest/valuation items.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to the Parent companys shareholders
candidates.why: Best book equity line because it excludes non-controlling interests, satisfying BE+MIB rule.
Fallback only if parent equity line missing; not preferred because it includes NCI.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to the Parent companys shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred parent-only equity line to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Direct NCI/minority interest line on balance sheet; best match.
Alternative label for the same concept in some years; useful fallback.

variables.notes: Priority list across years for minority interest / NCI.
